# Aegis Cloud - AI-Powered Windows Endpoint Management Platform

> Aegis Cloud is an enterprise-grade remote Windows endpoint management platform that combines AI-powered automation, real-time monitoring, and enterprise security to let IT professionals, MSPs, and power users manage Windows PCs from anywhere through a modern web dashboard.

## About Aegis Cloud

Aegis Cloud revolutionizes Windows endpoint management by providing:
- **AI-Powered Assistant**: Natural language commands for device management
- **Real-Time Monitoring**: Live CPU, RAM, GPU, disk, network, and battery stats
- **29+ Approved Tools**: Pre-approved operations for safe remote management
- **Enterprise Security**: TLS 1.3, JWT auth, 2FA, RBAC, zero-trust architecture
- **Lightweight Agent**: Rust-based Windows agent (< 20MB RAM, < 1% CPU)
- **Automation Engine**: Schedule maintenance, create workflows, batch operations
- **Plugin Ecosystem**: Extensible with custom plugins via Rust SDK

## Core Features

### 1. AI Assistant
- Natural language interface: "Clean temp files", "Restart Explorer", "Show processes"
- Multi-step reasoning: Breaks complex tasks into safe, approved operations
- Context-aware: Remembers device history and user preferences
- Zero-trust: Only executes pre-approved tools, never arbitrary commands

### 2. Real-Time Monitoring
- Live system metrics: CPU, RAM, GPU, disk usage, network I/O, battery
- Custom dashboards with graphs and charts
- Historical data analysis and trend detection
- Automated alerts for anomalies and threshold breaches

### 3. Remote Management
- **System Info**: CPU, RAM, GPU, disk, OS version, uptime
- **Process Management**: List, start, stop, restart processes
- **Service Control**: Manage Windows services remotely
- **File Management**: Browse, upload, download, rename, delete files
- **Remote Terminal**: Secure browser-based terminal with PTY support
- **Task Automation**: Schedule and automate maintenance tasks

### 4. Approved Tools (29+)
**System**: system_info, cpu_usage, ram_usage, gpu_usage, disk_usage
**Optimization**: clean_temp, empty_recycle_bin, flush_dns, restart_explorer, storage_analysis
**Processes**: list_processes, kill_process
**Services**: list_services, start_service, stop_service, restart_service
**Startup**: list_startup, enable_startup, disable_startup
**Files**: search_files, download_file, upload_file, delete_file, rename_file, move_file
**Network**: network_info, wifi_info, public_ip, local_ip
**Software**: installed_apps, uninstall_app
**Security**: defender_status, firewall_status, windows_update_status
**Maintenance**: run_sfc, run_dism

### 5. Automation & Scheduling
- **Scheduled Tasks**: Daily/weekly/monthly maintenance windows
- **Event Triggers**: React to system events automatically
- **Policy Engine**: Compliance monitoring and enforcement
- **Batch Operations**: Execute tasks across device groups
- **Custom Workflows**: Chain multiple operations together

### 6. Security Features
- **End-to-End Encryption**: TLS 1.3 for all connections
- **Authentication**: JWT tokens with automatic refresh
- **Two-Factor Auth**: TOTP-based 2FA (Google Authenticator, Authy)
- **Role-Based Access**: Owner, Admin, Manager, Technician, Viewer roles
- **Audit Logging**: Complete trail of all actions
- **Zero-Trust**: AI never executes arbitrary commands
- **Compliance**: GDPR ready, SOC 2 target, ISO 27001 target

## API Reference

### Base URLs
- **API**: `https://api.aegiscloud.in`
- **WebSocket**: `wss://api.aegiscloud.in/ws`
- **Docs**: `https://api.aegiscloud.in/docs` (Swagger UI)
- **ReDoc**: `https://api.aegiscloud.in/redoc` (Alternative docs)

### Authentication
- **Method**: JWT Bearer tokens
- **Access Token**: 30 minutes expiration
- **Refresh Token**: 7 days expiration
- **Header**: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

### Key Endpoints

#### Authentication
```
POST /api/v1/auth/register - Register new user
POST /api/v1/auth/login - Login with email/password
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh - Refresh access token
POST /api/v1/auth/logout - Logout
GET /api/v1/auth/me - Get current user
POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password - Request password reset
POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password - Reset password with token
POST /api/v1/auth/verify-email - Verify email address
POST /api/v1/auth/2fa/enable - Enable 2FA
POST /api/v1/auth/2fa/verify - Verify 2FA code
```

#### Devices
```
GET /api/v1/devices - List all devices
GET /api/v1/devices/{id} - Get device details
POST /api/v1/devices - Create/register device
PATCH /api/v1/devices/{id} - Update device
DELETE /api/v1/devices/{id} - Remove device
POST /api/v1/devices/{id}/restart - Restart device
POST /api/v1/devices/{id}/shutdown - Shutdown device
POST /api/v1/devices/{id}/wake - Wake-on-LAN
POST /api/v1/devices/pair - Pair device with code
POST /api/v1/devices/pair-code - Generate pair code
```

#### Commands
```
GET /api/v1/commands - List commands
GET /api/v1/commands/{id} - Get command details
POST /api/v1/commands - Create/execute command
POST /api/v1/commands/{id}/cancel - Cancel command
POST /api/v1/commands/{id}/retry - Retry command
```

#### AI Assistant
```
POST /api/v1/ai/chat - Send message to AI assistant
POST /api/v1/ai/execute - Execute AI-suggested command
```

#### Tools
```
GET /api/v1/tools - List all approved tools
GET /api/v1/tools/{name} - Get tool details
POST /api/v1/tools/{name}/execute - Execute tool
POST /api/v1/tools/{name}/validate - Validate tool parameters
```

#### Billing (Lemon Squeezy)
```
GET /api/v1/billing/subscription - Get current subscription
POST /api/v1/billing/checkout - Create checkout session
GET /api/v1/billing/portal - Get customer portal URL
POST /api/v1/billing/cancel - Cancel subscription
GET /api/v1/billing/payments - Get payment history
```

#### Schedules
```
GET /api/v1/schedules - List scheduled tasks
POST /api/v1/schedules - Create schedule
PATCH /api/v1/schedules/{id} - Update schedule
DELETE /api/v1/schedules/{id} - Delete schedule
POST /api/v1/schedules/{id}/toggle - Enable/disable schedule
```

#### Plugins
```
GET /api/v1/plugins - List available plugins
POST /api/v1/plugins/{id}/install - Install plugin
DELETE /api/v1/plugins/{id}/uninstall - Uninstall plugin
GET /api/v1/plugins/{id}/info - Get plugin details
```

#### WebSocket Events
```
device.connected - Device came online
device.disconnected - Device went offline
command.started - Command execution started
command.completed - Command finished successfully
command.failed - Command execution failed
live_stats - Real-time device statistics
notification - New notification received
```

## Use Cases

### IT Administrators
- Manage hundreds of workstations from single dashboard
- Automated patch deployment and updates
- Remote troubleshooting without physical access
- Compliance monitoring and reporting
- Batch operations across device groups

### Managed Service Providers (MSPs)
- Serve multiple clients with centralized management
- Automated maintenance and monitoring
- Multi-tenant architecture
- White-label options (Enterprise plan)
- SLA compliance tracking

### Small Businesses
- Affordable endpoint management without dedicated IT staff
- Pro and Business plans for growing teams
- Easy setup with zero configuration
- Secure remote access for distributed teams

### Power Users
- Manage multiple personal devices
- Automated maintenance schedules
- AI-assisted troubleshooting
- Remote file access and management

### Developers
- Test Windows applications remotely
- Debug issues on different Windows versions
- Automated testing workflows
- Plugin development with Rust SDK

## Technical Architecture

### Technology Stack
```
Frontend:
- Next.js 15 (React 19, App Router)
- TypeScript (strict mode)
- Tailwind CSS (custom design system)
- shadcn/ui (Radix primitives)
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Zustand (state management)
- TanStack Query (server state)
- Recharts (data visualization)

Backend:
- FastAPI (async Python framework)
- Python 3.13
- PostgreSQL 16 (primary database)
- Redis 7 (caching, pub/sub, rate limiting)
- SQLAlchemy 2.0 (ORM, async)
- Pydantic v2 (validation)
- JWT authentication
- WebSockets (real-time)

Windows Agent:
- Rust (memory-safe, high-performance)
- tokio (async runtime)
- tokio-tungstenite (WebSocket client)
- sysinfo (system monitoring)
- Windows Service API
- Ed25519 (code signing)
```

### Security Architecture
```
Transport Security:
- TLS 1.3 for all connections
- Certificate pinning support
- Perfect forward secrecy
- HSTS headers

Authentication:
- JWT tokens (30min access, 7day refresh)
- Automatic token rotation
- Two-factor authentication (TOTP)
- Role-based access control (5 roles)

Data Security:
- AES-256 encryption at rest
- Encrypted device tokens
- Secure password hashing (bcrypt)
- API key authentication

Zero-Trust:
- AI only executes pre-approved tools
- No arbitrary command execution
- Sandboxed execution environment
- Complete audit logging
```

### Infrastructure
```
Deployment:
- Docker containers
- Kubernetes-ready
- CDN (Vercel/Cloudflare)
- Auto-scaling support
- Multi-region deployment

Monitoring:
- OpenTelemetry tracing
- Prometheus metrics
- Grafana dashboards
- Structured logging
- Error tracking

Compliance:
- GDPR compliant
- SOC 2 Type II (target)
- ISO 27001 (target)
- HIPAA ready
- PCI DSS (via Lemon Squeezy)
```

## Pricing Plans

### Free Plan - $0/month
- Up to 2 devices
- Basic monitoring
- 5 AI queries per day
- File manager access
- Community support
- Perfect for trying out Aegis Cloud

### Pro Plan - $9/month (or $90/year)
- Up to 10 devices
- Advanced monitoring
- Unlimited AI queries
- Full file management
- Priority support
- Device groups
- Export history
- Custom themes
- 14-day free trial

### Business Plan - $29/month (or $290/year)
- Up to 50 devices
- Everything in Pro
- Role-based access control
- API access
- Audit logs
- Team collaboration
- SSO integration
- Dedicated support
- 14-day free trial

### Enterprise Plan - Custom pricing
- Unlimited devices
- Everything in Business
- On-premise deployment
- Custom integrations
- SLA guarantee (99.99%)
- Dedicated account manager
- Compliance reports
- 24/7 phone support
- Custom training
- White-label options

## Quick Start Guide

### For Users
1. **Sign Up**: Visit [aegiscloud.in](https://aegiscloud.in) and create free account
2. **Download Agent**: Get Windows Agent installer (15MB)
3. **Install**: Run installer as administrator (installs as Windows Service)
4. **Pair Device**: Enter pairing code in dashboard
5. **Start Managing**: Access dashboard, monitor devices, use AI assistant

### For Developers
1. **API Access**: Get API key from dashboard
2. **Authentication**: Use JWT Bearer tokens
3. **Explore API**: Visit https://api.aegiscloud.io/docs
4. **Integrate**: Use REST API or WebSocket for real-time updates
5. **Build Plugins**: Use Rust SDK to create custom tools

### For MSPs
1. **Business Plan**: Sign up for Business or Enterprise plan
2. **Multi-Tenant**: Create separate device groups per client
3. **Automation**: Set up scheduled maintenance for all clients
4. **Monitoring**: Centralized dashboard for all client devices
5. **Reporting**: Export compliance reports and audit logs

## Comparison with Alternatives

| Feature | Aegis Cloud | TeamViewer | AnyDesk | Microsoft Intune | NinjaRMM |
|---------|-------------|------------|---------|------------------|----------|
| AI Assistant | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ❌ No | ⚠️ Basic | ❌ No |
| Cost (10 devices) | $9/month | $50/month | $30/month | $80/month | $100/month |
| Setup Time | 5 minutes | 30 minutes | 20 minutes | Days | 2 hours |
| Agent Size | 15MB | 50MB | 30MB | N/A | 100MB |
| Zero-Trust AI | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ❌ No | ⚠️ Partial | ❌ No |
| Automation | ✅ Advanced | ⚠️ Basic | ⚠️ Basic | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| File Management | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ⚠️ Limited |
| Plugin System | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No |
| Self-Hosted | ✅ Enterprise | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No |
| Open Source Agent | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No |

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Aegis Cloud?
Aegis Cloud is an AI-powered remote Windows endpoint management platform that lets you monitor, control, and automate Windows PCs from anywhere through a secure web dashboard.

### How does the AI assistant work?
The AI assistant uses natural language processing to understand your commands and executes only pre-approved tools. It never runs arbitrary commands, ensuring zero-trust security.

### Is my data secure?
Yes. All data is encrypted with TLS 1.3 in transit and AES-256 at rest. We use JWT authentication, support 2FA, and maintain complete audit logs. We're GDPR compliant and targeting SOC 2 certification.

### What Windows versions are supported?
Windows 10 (version 1903+) and Windows 11, both Home and Pro editions. 64-bit only.

### Can I use Aegis Cloud for my business?
Yes! Our Business and Enterprise plans are designed for teams and organizations. They include role-based access control, API access, audit logs, SSO integration, and dedicated support.

### How much does it cost?
Free plan for 2 devices. Pro plan is $9/month for 10 devices. Business plan is $29/month for 50 devices. Enterprise pricing is custom. All paid plans include 14-day free trial.

### Can I self-host Aegis Cloud?
Yes, Enterprise customers can deploy Aegis Cloud on their own infrastructure (on-premise, private cloud, or hybrid).

### What's the difference between Aegis Cloud and TeamViewer?
Aegis Cloud is purpose-built for endpoint management with AI automation, while TeamViewer is primarily for remote desktop access. Aegis Cloud is 5-10x cheaper, easier to set up, and includes advanced automation features.

## Changelog & Updates

### Version 2.0 (July 2026)
- ✅ Added complete blog system with 3 comprehensive posts
- ✅ Created 7 new landing pages (pricing, features, about, contact, security, terms, privacy)
- ✅ Implemented 100/100 SEO optimization with 20+ target keywords

- ✅ Integrated Lemon Squeezy payment processing
- ✅ Created complete logo package with multiple sizes and formats
- ✅ Enhanced sitemap.xml and robots.txt
- ✅ Added llms.txt for AI crawlers

### Version 1.0 (January 2026)
- Initial public release
- Core endpoint management features
- AI assistant with 29 approved tools
- Real-time monitoring dashboard
- File management system
- Remote terminal access
- Automation engine
- Plugin SDK
